prediction.reasoning: The stock price prediction is made under the assumption that stock prices follow a random walk and can be modeled by historical volatility. One-day price movements often have minimal variance, so the point estimate is similar to the current price with minor bias for daily trend. Confidence intervals are constructed based on typical daily volatility and historical performance. Please note these are speculative and real-world events may significantly alter price movements.
